title: Samsung confirms 1,600 nits OLED panels for laptops from Lenovo, ASUS, Dell, and MSI
summary: The company sets a new brightness standard with DisplayHDR True Black 1400 certification for premium laptops from various manufacturers.

title: Hugging Face platform suffers security breach caused by autonomous AI agent
summary: The company confirmed unauthorized access to internal data and credentials, while fighting the attack with its own artificial intelligence.

title: Chinese startup Moonshot grabs attention with its Kimi K3 model, praised by Musk, while pausing subscriptions and seeking IPO
summary: The success of the open-source Kimi K3 model generates massive GPU demand, forces pause on new subscriptions, and accelerates plans for Hong Kong IPO.

title: Electric companies may expropriate private land for AI data center transmission lines
summary: A report reveals that utility companies can use eminent domain when landowners refuse to sell, to build data center infrastructure.

title: Xiaomi deploys full-time humanoid robot at its car factory
summary: Xiaomi's humanoid robot now works autonomously at the vehicle manufacturing plant, marking a significant advance in the company's industrial automation.

title: Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI threatens to derail startup's hardware plans
summary: Apple files lawsuit against OpenAI excluding Jony Ive, in a case that could affect the AI company's hardware projects.
